creator: royger@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to kpielorz from comment #10)

That's quite weird, I've just migrated a 10.3-RELEASE VM just fine using OSS Xen. I've used the 'raw' image found at:

ftp://ftp.nl.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/releases/VM-IMAGES/10.3-RELEASE/amd64/Latest/

And I haven't installed anything at all in there, it's just the plain image (I haven't even configured it). Maybe it's some kind of incompatibility with 10.3 and xe-guest-utilities?

IF you can, please post the full trace and I will try to give it a look (open a new PR and assign it to me).
